neutral.note: Resting face. Calm, composed default state. Use as a reset between other expressions.

curious.note: Neutral face with slightly raised eyebrows. Conveys mild interest, attentiveness, or a hint of surprise. Use for listening beats or gentle reactions.

angry.note: Clear furrowed brow and narrowed eyes. Strong negative emotion — use for frustration, irritation, or confrontation.

sad.note: Downcast eyes and softened features. Use for disappointment, empathy, or somber moments.

happy.note: Warm smile with softly closed eyes. Elevated joy — more intense than a neutral smile. Use for good news, laughter, or warm moments.

surprised.note: Wide open eyes, clear look of shock or astonishment. Use for unexpected reveals or sudden reactions.

embarrassed.note: Flustered expression. Use for awkward situations, compliments, or self-conscious moments.

bored.note: Heavy-lidded, uninterested look. Use to convey disengagement, impatience, or mild disdain.

idle.note: Default idle animation loop. Subtle breathing and natural movement.

tap.note: Reaction to a tap or touch interaction. Brief startled or responsive motion.

note: Review entry — identical to majo but nod runs with out_of_range_mode:none. Used by entry_validation_review to show uncorrected behaviour.

neutral.note: Slight upward mouth curve. Calm resting state.

happy.note: Eyes closed to smile shape with raised brows. Warm, positive.

surprised.note: Wide eyes ×2, raised brow, open mouth form.

bored.note: Heavy-lidded eyes 80%, flat brow form, downturned mouth.

sad.note: Soft eyes 80%, brow slightly down with arched form (worried shape), strongly downturned mouth.

angry.note: Brow fully down, negative brow form, strong negative mouth, mouth open.

curious.note: Slightly raised brows, ParamEyeLOpen/R Multiply 1.05 for widened eyes. Conveys mild interest or attentiveness.

embarrassed.note: Reversed brow direction (ParamBrowLY=+0.5), softened brow form, strained smile. Best achievable without blush parameter. Blush investigation pending (non-blocking).

wry.note: Dry wit register — mouth curve 0.75, brow raise 0.2, eyes 90% open. Sable's primary expression; use for sardonic commentary, knowing asides, and the 'I told you so' beat.

grave.note: Solemn authority — fully open eyes (holds gaze), brow −0.15, clear frown (−0.75). Distinct from sad: no grief, no softening. Use for tragic facts, real casualty counts, endings that didn't go well.

hushed.note: Conspiratorial register — eyes 78% open (noticeably hooded), neutral mouth (0.0). The 'what I'm about to tell you didn't make the textbooks' face. Use for hushed and conspiratorial tone beats.

contemptuous.note: Mildly superior, affectionate contempt — eyes 90%, brow slightly raised (+0.1) with subtle furrow (BrowLForm −0.4), mouth 0.45. Use sparingly for myth-correction and 'the historians were not there' beats.

idle.note: Default idle loop. fade_to_idle: disabled (idle is the target; no self-transition).

nod_review.note: Review hold — 3.5s head-down for breath-snap comparison. fade_to_idle: 1.0s.

nod.note: Standard discourse nod — up-then-down head dip, 50% amplitude (peak −5°). Entry-independent from breath cycle (valid ±8°); no breath guard. Use this for most acknowledgement beats. fade_to_idle: 0.5s.

deep_nod.note: Full-amplitude discourse nod (peak −10°). Entry-dependent: assumes head near yaw center (valid ±5°); lerp breath guard active. Use for emphatic acknowledgement. fade_to_idle: 0.7s.

look_away.note: Thinking/recalling gaze shift — eyes move up-right, head follows with 150ms lag. Returns to neutral. fade_to_idle: 1.0s.

tap.note: Startled tap reaction — damped oscillation simulating lateral impact and recovery. fade_to_idle: 0.5s.

lean_in.note: Key-revelation cue — slow AngleY dip to −10°, 1.0s hold, 3.2s total. No breath guard (amplitude above ±8° breath noise floor). fade_to_idle smooths exit snap. Pair with voice drop and pacing slow-down. Sable signature: key_revelation.

consult.note: Chapter-open cue — AngleZ tilt +14° + EyeBallY −0.4, 0.8s hold, 2.5s total. fade_to_idle handles exit: 0.7s blend from end-of-reaction snapshot toward live idle+breath. Sable signature: chapter_open / 'let me find the file'.

glance_down.note: Historical-gap beat — EyeBallY −0.6 only, 0.4s hold, 1.4s total. No breath guard (EyeBallY not a breath param; AngleY removed as ±8° breath overwhelms −4° signal). Mock-sheepish punctuation. Sable signature: historical_gap. fade_to_idle: 0.5s.

address.note: Correction-of-historians cue — AngleY +6° chin-up, 1.0s total. No breath guard (amplitude above ±8° breath noise floor; AngleX removed as ±15° breath overwhelms centering). FadeIn 0.3s handles the turn-to-face from any off-axis position. fade_to_idle: 0.7s.
